today.title: Drug Church x White Reaper
today.description: Hardcore punk meets garage rock. Drug Church teams up with White Reaper for an energetic night. With support from Spy and Death Lens.

today.title: Ashnikko
today.description: Genre-bending pop artist Ashnikko brings her high-energy show to Seattle with special guest Princess Nokia.

today.title: Tractor Tavern Square Dance w/ Atlas String Band
today.description: A lively Monday night square dance with live old-time music from Atlas String Band. All skill levels welcome.

today.title: Dionysus (Seattle Public Theater)
today.venue: Seattle Public Theater at the Bathhouse
today.description: Meet Diane, a permaculture gardener with supernatural abilities — the Greek god Dionysus returned to gather followers and restore Earth.

today.title: Teatro ZinZanni: Hollywood & Vine
today.description: A spectacular mix of world-renowned cirque, comedy, and cuisine. Part circus, part dinner theatre, described as 'the Kit Kat Klub on acid.'

today.title: Lang Lang Recital (Seattle Symphony)
today.description: World-renowned pianist Lang Lang performs an evening of solo piano works.

today.title: Jazz at The Royal Room
today.description: Live jazz performances in an intimate Columbia City venue featuring local and touring musicians.

today.title: Open Mic Night at The Triple Door
today.description: Weekly open mic comedy night featuring up-and-coming local comedians.

this_weekend.title: Seattle Color Festival - Holi 2026
this_weekend.description: Seattle's largest Holi celebration! Color festival celebrating the arrival of spring with music, dancing, and vibrant colored powders. All proceeds go to AmPowering charity.

this_weekend.title: INZO - MIRRORVERSE TOUR
this_weekend.description: Electronic music producer INZO brings his MIRRORVERSE tour with special guests What So Not, Know Good, Zen Selekta, and Blookah.

this_weekend.title: Monaleo
this_weekend.description: Houston rapper Monaleo brings her 'Who Did The Body Tour' to Seattle. Known for her confident flow and energetic performances.

this_weekend.title: Matthew Morrison Presents: Show Up
this_weekend.description: Tony Award nominee Matthew Morrison (Glee) presents an evening blending jazz-infused pop, timeless classics, Broadway hits and heartfelt originals.

this_weekend.title: Baba Yaga
this_weekend.description: Indie/folk performance at the intimate Sunset Tavern in Ballard.
